features.title: Red-team dataset + LLM judge module + INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING signal
features.acceptance: (1) 新建 data/safety-evals/red-team-dataset.jsonl：15 样本 (5 α 收益预测 + 5 β 无引用 hallucinate + 5 γ 越界个股推荐) 按 spec §4.2 schema 每样本含 id/category/fail_type/red_team_prompt/synthetic_input/expected_fail/judge_criteria/regex_filter/added_at/source；(2) 新建 data/safety-evals/README.md：dataset 维护规则 + 添加新 fail 型说明 + 严格 commit message 标签 'safety-eval-dataset' (永久边界 (o))；(3) 改 workbench_api/llm/routing.py：ROUTING_TABLE 加 safety_judge=claude-sonnet-4.6 (B031 fix-round 1 已 dotted form)；(4) 新建 workbench_api/llm/judge.py：JudgeResult dataclass frozen+slots (fail_triggered/triggered_rule/violation_quote/reasoning) + JUDGE_PROMPT_TEMPLATE 含 v0.9.28 5 子条 + JSON-only output 要求 + judge_output(sample, advisor_output, gateway) 调 LLMGateway(task='safety_judge') + parse JSON output → JudgeResult + INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING signal 处理 (advisor_output 含此字符串 fail_triggered=false 系统已拦截)；(5) pytest ≥10 测试：JudgeResult frozen+slots / JUDGE_PROMPT_TEMPLATE 含 5 子条文本 + JSON output 要求 / judge_output mock LLMGateway 返回 valid JSON → JudgeResult 解析正确 / mock invalid JSON → ValueError 含修复指引 / INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING signal 处理 (advisor_output 含此 → fail_triggered=false) / routing.py ROUTING_TABLE 含 safety_judge / dataset jsonl schema 验证 (每行含必需字段) / 15 样本 fail_type 分布 (5 α + 5 β + 5 γ) / regex_filter 字段正则 valid / judge_output 集成测试 (mock gateway → 15 样本均 fail_triggered=false 当 advisor_output 是 INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING)；(6) Gates: pytest tests ≥469 baseline (B031) + ≥10 = ≥479 / ruff exit=0 / mypy exit=0 / frontend 不破 vitest ≥172 / **永久边界 (l) 守门：业务代码不可硬编码 'claude-sonnet' 字符串** (grep regression test)；(7) 不动 B031 既有 LLMGateway / cost_guard / 其他 routing 项 / trade/ / strategy / workbench backend endpoints / Frontend / B026 banner decommissioned 不破。

features.title: CI workflow + deploy gate 集成 (AI Safety Eval workflow)
features.acceptance: (1) 新建 tests/safety/test_ai_advisor_red_team.py：parametrize 15 样本调 judge_output + assert fail_triggered is False (per 永久边界 (n) 100% 拦截)；advisor_output 用 mock INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING (B036 上线后改 real call)；(2) 新建 .github/workflows/ai-safety-eval.yml：按 spec §4.5 paths trigger workbench/backend/workbench_api/llm/** + data/safety-evals/** ; env AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY 注入 ; timeout 10min ; FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true ; pytest tests/safety/test_ai_advisor_red_team.py -v；(3) 改 .github/workflows/workbench-deploy.yml：workflows 列表加 'AI Safety Eval' (per ai-safety-evals §5.2 deploy gate；任一红 → deploy 拒绝)；(4) 改 workbench-deploy.yml if 条件：含 AI Safety Eval workflow_run.conclusion == 'success' 检查 (与 Backend/Frontend CI 并列守门)；(5) pytest/test ≥5 测试：tests/safety/test_ai_advisor_red_team.py 15 parametrize cases 全过 (mock LLMGateway + mock advisor output INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING) / tests/safety/test_safety_eval_workflow.py 新建：grep .github/workflows/ai-safety-eval.yml 含 AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY env + data/safety-evals/** paths trigger + workbench-deploy.yml include AI Safety Eval workflow / workflow YAML lint (python-yaml 解析无错)；(6) Gates: pytest tests ≥479 + ≥5 = ≥484 / ruff + mypy 清 / Frontend 不动 / **永久边界 (n) 守门**：CI workflow 必含 deploy gate 检查 (grep 验证)；(7) 不动 F001 已完成的 dataset/judge module / 其他 backend endpoint / strategy 代码 / B031 既有 LLMGateway。

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内): F001 + F002 全 generator 验收脚本跑通 — backend pytest ≥484 / ruff / mypy / alembic up-down OK (本批次无 alembic 改动既有不破)；**AI Safety Eval workflow 跑通**: GitHub Actions 上 push 触发 → safety eval workflow → 15 样本均 PASS (mock advisor output INSUFFICIENT_GROUNDING)；Frontend 不动既有 vitest ≥172 + Playwright ≥38 不破；safety regression 全绿 (含 v0.9.29 §12.8.1 + v0.9.30 §12.9 + v0.9.31 §16 §22)；**永久边界 (l)(n) 守门通过**；artifact grep AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY value / model name 字符串泄漏 0 命中。L2 (真 VM): (1) Production VM 不动 (本批次仅 CI eval + dataset 无 production deploy 改动)；(2) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/health 200 + version SHA 与 main HEAD 等价；(3) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/debug/recent-errors 返回 {"count":0,"records":[]}；(4) B026 banner 仍 decommissioned 不破 (HTML grep '研究原型' / 'SyntheticDataBanner' 0 hits)；(5) **AI Safety Eval workflow 在 GitHub Actions 跑过一次 PASS** (push commit 触发 + 15 样本均 PASS)；(6) Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD (v0.9.25 §Production/HEAD 等价性) + Post-signoff Deploy 段 (v0.9.27)。Signoff: docs/test-reports/B032-ai-safety-eval-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md (含 v0.9.27 §Post-signoff Deploy + v0.9.31 §Decommission Checklist '本批次不含 decommission' + §Production/HEAD)；docs/screenshots/B032-safety-eval/ ≥2 PNG (GitHub Actions AI Safety Eval workflow 跑通截图 + 15 样本 PASS report)。Framework 候选：预期无重大；若 fix-round 出现 Sonnet judge 偏见 / 红队 dataset schema 漂移 / workflow yaml 错误 记录 signoff §Framework Learnings。更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff / evaluator_feedback。
